description: Encode a raw 320x240 yuv420p stream (testdata/sample.yuv) to MP4. Exercises Input.Kind = "raw" with the typed format / pixel_format / video_size / framerate fields (Wave 5 #23-#28). Note: if you edit this JSON manually, you must also update or remove the ffmpeg_cmd field.
ffmpeg_cmd: ffmpeg -f rawvideo -framerate 30 -pixel_format yuv420p -video_size 320x240 -i {{raw_yuv}} -map 0:v:0 -c:v libx264 -x264-params:v crf=28:preset=ultrafast -map_metadata 0 -map_chapters 0 -f mp4 {{output}}
